user.title: Plenitude — Sign in
user.description: Enter your Plenitude credentials. Your password is NOT kept after this step; only the access tokens are stored.

tariffs.title: Plenitude — Detected tariffs
tariffs.description: Tariffs auto-detected from your customer portal. Edit if needed.

error.tariff_parse_failed: Could not auto-detect tariffs. Enter them manually on the next step.

abort.already_configured: This Plenitude account is already configured.

reauth.title: Plenitude — Re-authentication
reauth.description: Has the password for your account changed? Enter the new one to refresh the tokens.
